column1: # Blood Smith — staging cards (new rows only, no header)
# Class identity: forges from blood and bone. Primary stats RESONANCE + IRON.
# Existing roster: 12 L1 core + 2 power + 1 capstone = 13. Filling L2, L3 (x3 paths), L5, L9 (x3 paths).

column3: Level-up: your bone-forged weapons remember each wound. Once per combat, when you pay HP for a card, recover half that HP at end of turn.
Level-up: the anvil beats in time with your pulse. Pay 3 HP to gain +1 AP this turn; cannot be used while below half HP.

column1: # --- L3 Subclass: The Weaponsmith (4) — forges living weapons from blood and bone ---

column3: A fresh-forged blade still wet with marrow-heat. Pay 3 HP to draw a living weapon for the round; your next attack echoes against a second enemy.
The blade drinks before it strikes. Pay 4 HP; your next melee attack this turn applies Bleed 4 and heals you for the Bleed damage dealt.
Shatter a living weapon mid-swing. Deal 9 + IRON damage split among up to three enemies; pay 5 HP; apply Bleed 2 to each struck.
Tear a blade apart and rebuild it sharper. Pay 6 HP to refresh one combat card you've played this turn; that card deals +IRON damage next time it resolves this combat.

column1: # --- L3 Subclass: The Armorer (4) — grows armor from sacrificed flesh ---

column3: Grow a carapace of hardened flesh. Pay 4 HP; apply Guard 6 + IRON; gain Regen 2 while the Guard holds.
Peel off a sheet of your own plating for an ally. Pay 5 HP; target ally gains Guard 5 + IRON and the next melee attacker against them takes 4 resonant damage.
Every blow that bites you feeds the plate. Pay 6 HP; until end of round, the first attack that hits you is reduced to half damage and the attacker is hit with Expose 3.
Lace your flesh into an ally's wounds. Pay 8 HP; an ally within 15 feet heals 10 + RESONANCE and gains Guard 4 + IRON; you take no healing this turn.

column1: # --- L3 Subclass: The Sculptor (4) — shapes blood into constructs and servants ---

column3: Sculpt a lope-shaped servant from cooling blood. Pay 4 HP; summon a Marrow Hound (1 AP to command; melee attack 5 + RESONANCE). Lasts until end of combat or destroyed.
Raise a still, watchful figure from a pool of your own blood. Pay 5 HP; place a Sentry in an adjacent space that grants you Guard 3 while you stand beside it and strikes the first enemy to move past.
Twitch the threads of a bleeding foe. Target enemy suffering Bleed loses 1 AP next turn and is pulled 10 feet; pay 4 HP.
Every enemy felled this combat leaves a red impression; you call it back. Pay 7 HP; summon a silent Echo of the last enemy slain (half its HP, uses its basic attack for you) until end of combat.
The heart beats, and iron answers. Pay 12 HP; until end of next turn, every card you play refunds 1 HP per point of damage dealt and applies Bleed 2 on hit.

Open the last, deepest artery and forge the blade only you can wield. Pay 16 HP; deal 24 + IRON damage to one target; if they survive, apply Bleed 5 and Expose 5 and the blade strikes again for 12 + IRON at end of your next turn.

Shatter every weapon you've forged this combat into a storm of splinters. Pay 14 HP; deal 8 + IRON damage to each enemy within 15 feet per Weaponsmith card you've played this combat (min 2, max 6 triggers).

Erupt a dome of rib and plate over your allies. Pay 18 HP; all allies within 15 feet gain Guard 10 + IRON and immunity to Bleed for 2 rounds; enemies entering the dome take 6 + RESONANCE resonant damage.
Shed your final layer of flesh as perfect armor. Pay HP equal to half your current total; you cannot be reduced below 1 HP for 2 rounds and reflect half of all damage taken back to its source.
Pour out a year of stored blood and shape an army. Pay 20 HP; summon 3 Marrow Hounds and 1 Sanguine Sentry at your position; they act on your turn and dissolve after 3 rounds.

Sculpt a replica of an enemy in red wax and set it bleeding. Pay 12 HP; target enemy copies its current Bleed stacks onto itself each round for 3 rounds, and any healing they receive heals you instead.
